# Quick Fix: Update icon-explorer.mdx imports to rn-iconify/dev

Generated: 2026-03-12

## Change Made

- File: `docs/docs/features/icon-explorer.mdx`
- Change: 11 runtime import statements updated from `rn-iconify` to `rn-iconify/dev`; dev-only info admonition added after frontmatter

### Admonition added

After the closing `---` of the frontmatter:

```
:::info Dev-only Import
IconExplorer and related utilities are exported from `rn-iconify/dev` to keep production bundles lean.
:::
```

### Not changed

- Lines 243-246: comment strings `// "import { Mdi } from 'rn-iconify';"` — these are example output strings, not import statements
- No type-only imports were present in the file
